title: Meta plans to develop custom chips to train its AI models
description: Meta Platforms Inc, which recently reached major deals with top chipmakers, still has ambitions for its own custom silicon, including plans to develop processors that can train future artificial intelligence models, the company's chief financial officer said.

title: Morgan Stanley lays off 2,500 employees across divisions: Report
description: The job cuts are not linked to artificial intelligence-related reforms but stem from shifting business priorities, a revised global location strategy and performance reviews of employees, according to a Wall Street Journal report, citing sources.
content:
New Delhi: US-based investment banker Morgan Stanley has reportedly laid off about 2,500 employees, or roughly 3 per cent of its global workforce, starting in early March, reports have said.

title: Broadcom Shares Surge In Post Market Trade After Strong Q1 Earnings
description: Shares of Broadcom Inc. jumped more than 5% in after-hours trading after the chip giant reported stronger-than-expected quarterly results, powered by a surge in artificial intelligence demand.

title: AI vs freshers: Are entry-level jobs disappearing for graduates?
description: Artificial intelligence is rapidly transforming how companies operate, but its effects are beginning to show most clearly at the very start of careers. As automation absorbs routine tasks, the traditional entry point into many professions is quietly narrowing for new graduates.
content:
The job market for young graduates is not collapsing, but it is changing, and the pace of that change is faster than many institutions are prepared for.

title: Amazon layoffs: robotics team hit in latest cuts
description: The division axed on Tuesday is responsible for ​designing robots and other conveyances for automation, primarily in warehouses. Starting ​with a round of some 14,000 white-collar ⁠employees in October, Amazon has trimmed 30,000 corporate ​employees, tying them to efficiency gains from ​artificial intelligence, as well as revising company culture.

title: Novel interceptor drones bend air-defense economics in Ukraine’s favor
description: Artificial intelligence plays no role yet in interception missions — today it is still manual ramming or close-in detonation.
content:
